description: Multi-tenant HIPAA-compliant appointment platform. Monorepo with packages/api, packages/web, packages/shared, Prisma schema, infrastructure, and docs.

principles.text: HIPAA compliance and patient data security always win. No design decision, performance optimization, or feature deadline overrides patient data protection.
Tenant isolation is inviolable. No data may leak across clinic boundaries. Every data access path must be scoped by tenantId.
Every patient data access is logged through audit middleware with no exceptions. The audit trail must be complete and tamper-evident.
Strict TypeScript everywhere. No use of 'any' types. Zod schemas validate all data at API boundaries. The type system is a safety net, not a suggestion.
Nothing ships without tests. New endpoints require test coverage. All changes must pass the full CI gate before landing.
Code clarity over cleverness. Prefer readable, explicit implementations over terse or abstract patterns.

sensitive_patterns.pattern: Real SSN formats (XXX-XX-XXXX) outside of test files
Hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
Patient names, DOBs, or other PII in logs or comments
PII in error messages or production responses
Client-side caching of patient data (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies, client state)
Redis caching of insurance verification data beyond 24-hour TTL
Stack traces in production error responses
Patient data hydrated into client-side state
